title: Use Multi-Factor Authentication
description: Use multifactor authentication for local and network access to privileged accounts and for network access to non-privileged accounts.

checks.name: MFA is Enforced for Privileged Account Local Access
checks.purpose: Verify MFA is required for local logon to privileged accounts via Windows Hello for Business, smart card, or equivalent

checks.name: MFA is Enforced for Privileged Account Network Access
checks.purpose: Confirm MFA is required for remote or network access to privileged accounts via Conditional Access, RADIUS, or equivalent

checks.name: MFA is Enforced for Non-Privileged Network Access
checks.purpose: Verify MFA is required for network access by non-privileged accounts via Conditional Access or equivalent policy

checks.name: Smart Card or Windows Hello for Business is Configured
checks.purpose: Confirm the system supports and enforces a FIPS-compliant MFA mechanism such as smart card or Windows Hello for Business

checks.name: MFA is Enforced for Privileged Account Local Access
checks.purpose: Verify MFA is required for local logon to privileged accounts via smart card or Windows Hello for Business

checks.name: MFA is Enforced for Privileged Account Network Access
checks.purpose: Confirm MFA is required for RDP and other remote access by privileged accounts via NLA and Conditional Access or equivalent

checks.name: MFA is Enforced for Non-Privileged Network Access
checks.purpose: Verify MFA is required for all network logons including non-privileged accounts

checks.name: Smart Card Required for Interactive Logon is Configured
checks.purpose: Confirm the Interactive logon: Require smart card Group Policy setting is enabled for privileged accounts or all accounts

checks.name: MFA PAM Module is Installed and Configured
checks.purpose: Verify a PAM MFA module (e.g., pam_google_authenticator, pam_duo, pam_radius) is installed and configured for SSH and console login

checks.name: SSH MFA Challenge-Response is Enabled
checks.purpose: Confirm sshd_config enables ChallengeResponseAuthentication or AuthenticationMethods to enforce MFA for SSH sessions

checks.name: MFA is Enforced for Privileged sudo Access
checks.purpose: Verify sudo is configured to require MFA re-authentication via PAM before granting elevated privileges

checks.name: MFA PAM Module is Installed and Configured
checks.purpose: Verify a PAM MFA module (e.g., pam_google_authenticator, pam_duo) is installed and configured for SSH and console login on Debian

checks.name: SSH MFA Challenge-Response is Enabled
checks.purpose: Confirm sshd_config enables ChallengeResponseAuthentication or AuthenticationMethods to enforce MFA for SSH sessions

checks.name: MFA is Enforced for Privileged sudo Access
checks.purpose: Verify sudo is configured to require MFA re-authentication via PAM before granting elevated privileges on Debian

remediation: Enable Windows Hello for Business or enforce smart card logon for privileged accounts. Configure Conditional Access policies to require MFA for all network access. On Linux, install and configure a PAM MFA module (pam_google_authenticator, pam_duo) and enable ChallengeResponseAuthentication in sshd_config.
